output.code:
# Let's load text file
path = '/mnt/data/file-Y3ugb95xVFatkbCsqcewR3-Q031.txt'  # may be correct path; check
with open(path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text[:1000]

quotes = [
"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ مِنْ نَفْسٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَخَلَقَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَبَثَّ مِنْهُمَا رِجَالًا كَثِيرًا وَنِسَاءً",
"وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُمْ مِنْ أَنْفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَاجًا لِتَسْكُنُوا إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ مَوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً",
"يا معشر الشباب، من استطاع منكم الباءة فليتزوج، فإنه أغض للبصر وأحصن للفرج، ومن لم يستطع فعليه بالصوم فإنه له وجاء",
"لا ينظر الرجل إلى عورة الرجل ولا المرأة إلى عورة المرأة"
]
for q in quotes:
    idx = text.find(q)
    print(q[:20], idx)

spans=[]
for q in quotes:
    idx=text.find(q)
    spans.append((idx, idx+len(q)))
spans

يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ
وخلق منها زوجها وبث منهما رجالاً كثيراً ونساءً
خلقكم من نفس واحدة سورة النساء
واتقوا الله الذي تساءلون به والأرحام

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":252,"span_end":406,"span_text":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ اتَّقُوا رَبَّكُمُ الَّذِي خَلَقَكُمْ مِنْ نَفْسٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَخَلَقَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَبَثَّ مِنْهُمَا رِجَالًا كَثِيرًا وَنِسَاءً","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"النساء","sura_number":4,"aya_number":1},"hadeeth_reference":{		"collection_name": "","book_number": 0,"hadith_number": 0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":580,"span_end":707,"span_text":"وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُمْ مِنْ أَنْفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَاجًا لِتَسْكُنُوا إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ مَوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الروم","sura_number":30,"aya_number":21},"hadeeth_reference":{		"collection_name": "","book_number": 0,"hadith_number": 0},"corrected_text":"وَمِنْ آيَاتِهِ أَنْ خَلَقَ لَكُمْ مِنْ أَنْفُسِكُمْ أَزْوَاجًا لِتَسْكُنُوا إِلَيْهَا وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ مَوَدَّةً وَرَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":963,"span_end":1076,"span_text":"يا معشر الشباب، من استطاع منكم الباءة فليتزوج، فإنه أغض للبصر وأحصن للفرج، ومن لم يستطع فعليه بالصوم فإنه له وجاء","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{		"sura_name": "","sura_number": 0,"aya_number": 0},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Bukhari","book_number":67,"hadith_number":5066},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":1145,"span_end":1200,"span_text":"لا ينظر الرجل إلى عورة الرجل ولا المرأة إلى عورة المرأة","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{		"sura_name": "","sura_number": 0,"aya_number": 0},"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Muslim","book_number":3,"hadith_number":338},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
